title: Model-guided public U-Boot/ATF/SCP no-build audit

findings.finding: Public U-Boot sunxi MMC data path is PIO-only.
findings.evidence: drivers/mmc/sunxi_mmc.c uses mmc_trans_data_by_cpu() for all data transfers and explicitly sets SUNXI_MMC_GCTRL_ACCESS_BY_AHB.
findings.decision: Public U-Boot cannot prove or disprove Linux normal-IDMAC descriptor fetch behavior.

findings.finding: Public U-Boot A733 MMC0 CCU gate/reset offsets match the Linux diagnostic CCU driver.
findings.evidence: U-Boot drivers/clk/sunxi/clk_a733.c has CLK_BUS_MMC0 at 0x0d0c bit 0 and RST_BUS_MMC0 at 0x0d0c bit 16. Linux drivers/clk/sunxi-ng/ccu-sun60i-a733.c has bus_mmc0 at 0xd0c bit 0 and reset RST_BUS_MMC0 at 0xd0c bit 16.
findings.decision: No new clock/reset offset patch is justified from public U-Boot.

findings.finding: Public U-Boot A733 DTS carries IRQ 40 and two MMC clocks only.
findings.evidence: arch/arm/dts/sun60i-a733.dtsi uses clocks ahb/mmc, reset ahb, interrupt GIC_SPI 40, max-frequency 150 MHz. H035 already tested IRQ 40 and it regressed before card init completion.
findings.decision: Do not retest IRQ 40 or broaden DTS clocks from this audit.

findings.finding: The current Linux diagnostic driver already includes a pre-transfer FIFO, DMA interface, and IDMAC controller reset sequence.
findings.evidence: sunxi_mmc_start_dma() calls sunxi_mmc_diag_reset_fifo(), sunxi_mmc_diag_reset_dmaif(), and sunxi_mmc_diag_reset_dmactl() before enabling SDXC_DMA_ENABLE_BIT and SDXC_IDMAC_IDMA_ON.
findings.decision: The model suggestion to add a basic IDMAC reset is already covered. A different reset-order patch would need vendor/source evidence naming exact order or missing status clear.

public_archive_check.result: No useful public archive hit visible during this check.

decision: No behavior patch from H037. Continue source/model triage, but require a new named register, reset order, firmware handoff bit, master ID, or maintainer reply before building another kernel variant.
